name: Gingerbread Men2
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease three baking sheets.
2. Sift the flour, bicarbonate of soda, and ginger into a bowl.
3. Rub the butter into the flour until the mixture looks like fine crumbs.
4. Stir in the sugar.
5. Beat the syrup into the egg and stir into the bowl.
6. Mix to form a dough and knead until smooth.
7. Divide into two and roll out on a lightly floured surface to about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Using a gingerbread man cutter, cut out figures and place them on the baking sheets.
9. Decorate with currants.
10. Bake in the oven at 375°F for 12-15 minutes until golden.
11. Cool slightly then transfer to a wire rack.
